The '''Class-A cargo container''' was a brick-shaped freight container manufactured by [[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|Xizor Transport Systems]]. The container was designed to store cargo during transit in [[Realspace/Legends|realspace]] and [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. The [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] utilized four of these containers—a pair on both port and starboard—for their cargo storage. The Class-A container was also the main mode of cargo storage for [[container transport]]s, which could hold six containers.<ref name="XWA" />
